catalog.name: Momentum Machinery Part Complete Catalog
catalog.description: Complete detailed catalog of Falk Rexnord coupling products with correct specifications from official catalogs

categories.name: Wrapflex Couplings
categories.description: Elastomeric couplings with flexible element for misalignment compensation
features: Accommodates angular, parallel, and axial misalignment

models.description: The 5R Wrapflex coupling is ideal for small power transmission applications requiring flexible misalignment compensation with compact design.

installation.tools: Allen key only
installation.procedure: Align shafts, insert coupling, tighten set screws

maintenance.procedure: Visual inspection for wear and damage

models.description: The 10R Wrapflex coupling provides reliable performance for medium-duty applications with excellent misalignment compensation.

installation.tools: Allen key and torque wrench
